text:
Manufactured housing, as defined by Section 1201.003 (Definitions) , Occupations Code, is not a vehicle subject to this chapter.

Transferred and redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 502.0072 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B. 2357 ), Sec. 101, eff. January 1, 2012.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.142 — Manufactured Housing

Manufactured housing, as defined by Section 1201.003 (Definitions) , Occupations Code, is not a vehicle subject to this chapter.

Transferred and redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 502.0072 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B. 2357 ), Sec. 101, eff. January 1, 2012.
